title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
description: The system lacks detailed authentication and authorization information, making it vulnerable to attackers impersonating legitimate users. Default credentials or weak password policies could be exploited.
attack_vector: Brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, or direct exploitation of vulnerabilities in the authentication logic.  Lack of multi-factor authentication (MFA) exacerbates the risk.
mitigations: Implement strong password policies (complexity, length, rotation).
Enforce Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Regularly audit user accounts and permissions.
